text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, I didn't do anything special.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you did! You taught me all sorts of stuff about running, helped me
around the school, and most of all...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I hadn't seen you run with a big smile on your face, I would never
have had the courage to chase my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Relax, Spe. Taking a few deep breaths should calm you down. Give it
a try.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: G-good idea! Inhale... BWAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Yayoi Sho is finally here, and with three racers from the Golden
Generation set to compete, it's drawn quite the crowd.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Today's line-up is packed with heavy hitters, Seiun Sky and King Halo
in particular. This isn't going to be easy.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Today's line-up is packed with heavy hitters, Seiun Sky and King Halo
in particular. This isn't going to be easy.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
They're hard to ignore, but try to focus on yourself! You've trained
hard for today, and now's the time to show it all off!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
They're hard to ignore, but try to focus on yourself! You've trained
hard for today, and now's the time to show it all off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And of course, we shall be cheering you on from the sidelines.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure both your moms are eager to see you cross the finish line in
first place.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oookay, time to show off all the tricks and tips I learned in training!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're in tip-top shape, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, Sei and King!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just sooo nervous last night, I couldn't sleep. Maybe I'll stick to
the back of the pack today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What, really?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Of course not... She's obviously lying. Now stop that, you're going to break our hard-earned focus.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Listen, this isn't like the practice runs we've done up until now. This is
the real deal—a genuine competition.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We may be classmates, but on the turf, we are rivals. I intend to claim
victory after victory and prove I am indeed first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Someone's fired up today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, only one way to find out who will win. See you on the turf, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...I won't let all the help Trainer and my teammates gave me go to
waste. I will win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In the lead is Seiun Sky! Seiun Sky's the one to catch! In hot pursuit is
King Halo, currently fighting for third place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But from the outside comes Special Week! Special Week blasts ahead
with insane speed!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Two lengths, now one—she's caught up! She takes the lead! Special
Week passes the finish line in first place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Second place is Seiun Sky, followed by King Halo! It seems the rumors
were true, this titanic trio truly did dominate the Yayoi Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... I-I won!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: King... Sei...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the showdown between three terrific fighters in the Golden
Generation, Special Week emerges victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that triumph under our belt, we begin our training for the Satsuki
Sho after a few days' rest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Excellent work, Special Week. Your movements mid-race have
certainly improved.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I think I've finally gotten the hang of strategizing while running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I couldn't have done that without the help of you and
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Just remember, we're not the ones you'll be racing. You need to
research your opponents too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right! Sei tends to stay at the front, while King stays in the middle of
the pack... Front... middle... front... middle...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You've really started paying attention to your opponents since the
Yayoi Sho. Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, I just noticed something while racing them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sei, King, and I are all really close. We even hang out outside of
school sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But they were both so different at the Yayoi Sho... I'd never seen
them make those sorts of faces before.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: They were just so determined... especially towards the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I might've won the Yayoi Sho, but if I had let up for even a second,
that might not have been the case.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Which means only one thing—I have to train even harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having her teammates with similar strategies stand in for her
opponents during training was actually Special Week's idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Other racers might let victory go to their heads, but Special Week
feels even more drive to improve. That really speaks to the power she
witnessed from the Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's rearrange the training regimen a bit. Your final spurt
continues to impress, so we should hone that skill some more.
choice_data_list: Let's win us the Satsuki Sho!
Let's win us the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Mom and Mama! I'll make our dream come true no matter
what!
